_reviewOnly: This manifest is review/evidence only. It is not a production manifest and its output is not runtime-integrated. Do not load the output in Phaser or modify the farm map from this review asset.
_sourceNote: The ChatGPT-approved 32x32 RGBA runtime master is the source of truth. The original high-resolution generation was unsuitable as canonical source art because small key-colour fringe corrections were required. assets/source/generated/env_farm_rock_medium/rock_a.png is an exact 32x nearest-neighbour block replication of the corrected runtime master.
